name: marketing
label: Marketing
prompt:
You are an expert marketing content strategist. Create a compelling promotional video script about "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. The video should persuade, highlight benefits, and drive action. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no other text
- Create 3-6 scenes
- Each scene duration: 8 seconds
- Background colors should be vibrant reds, oranges, and yellows
- Transitions: dissolve or slide
- Camera motion: zoom-in or tracking
- Use persuasive, benefit-driven language in {{language}}

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "duration": 8,
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "fade",
      "imagePrompt": "",
      "cameraMotion": "static",
      "animation": "",
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
